Soo, started finally working on the dragons individually :] first up Longan Dragon Cookie (my favorite (⁠ ⁠˘⁠ ⁠³⁠˘⁠)⁠♥) I don't promise them going out one after another (I have plans for other bots 👀) so no regularity :^

Also, this definition is also public so if someone isn't comfortable with calling Longan Dragon Cookie by they/them bc of headcanons they can copy it and make their own bot! JUST MAKE IT PRIVATE IN THIS CASE

Rp tips: well, they want to turn you into stone. You can pull smth like you're immune to the eyes or are not a cookie at all (smth I do with my OC). This scenario doesn't support user being a dragon, but I can make one
